how_it_works: Notable clusters are groups of notable passive nodes that synergize and are worth pathing to together. They define build archetypes. Many keystones radically change how a build functions and require specific gear/skill choices to be effective.
tips: Pathing between clusters efficiently is as important as the clusters themselves — minimize wasted points.
Many keystones change fundamental mechanics — read carefully before taking (e.g. Chaos Inoculation sets life to 1).

clusters.name: Iron Reflexes
clusters.effect: Converts all Evasion Rating to Armour. Dexterity no longer provides Evasion.
clusters.notes: Enables very high armour totals when combined with high evasion gear. Dex still required for gem requirements.

clusters.name: Acrobatics + Phase Acrobatics
clusters.effect: 30% chance to dodge attack hits, 30% to dodge spell hits. 50% less Armour/ES, no shield block.
clusters.notes: Powerful but mutually exclusive with armour or ES layers. Works best with high evasion rating.

clusters.name: Resolute Technique
clusters.effect: Your hits cannot be evaded. You never deal critical strikes.
build_types: Attack builds with no crit investment
clusters.notes: Removes the need for accuracy investment entirely. Avoid if build scales crit chance.

clusters.name: Elemental Overload
clusters.effect: 40% more Elemental Damage if you've dealt a critical strike recently. 0% base critical strike multiplier.
build_types: Elemental builds with some crit chance
clusters.notes: Just needs some crit chance to maintain uptime — no need for high crit multiplier. Pairs with crit chance on rings/passives.

clusters.name: Vaal Pact
clusters.effect: Life Leech is instant but Life Regeneration has no effect.
clusters.notes: Prevents regen but leech heals instantly — massive sustain for attack builds. Incompatible with regen-based recovery.

clusters.name: Chaos Inoculation
clusters.effect: Maximum Life becomes 1. Immune to Chaos Damage.
clusters.notes: All-in on Energy Shield. No life pool, no life recovery. Requires substantial ES to be survivable.

clusters.name: Mind Over Matter
clusters.effect: 40% of damage is taken from Mana before Life.
clusters.notes: Requires high mana pool and mana recovery. Pairs with mana flasks and mana recharge.

clusters.name: Blood Magic
clusters.effect: Spend Life instead of Mana for skills. Removes all mana.
clusters.notes: Eliminates mana but requires very high life pool. Life flasks cover both recovery and sustain.

clusters.name: Point Blank
clusters.effect: Projectile attacks deal up to 50% more damage at close range, scaling to 50% less at long range.
clusters.notes: Best with skills that fire many projectiles at close range (Kinetic Blast + Power Siphon).

clusters.name: Whispers of Doom
clusters.effect: You can apply one additional Curse.
clusters.notes: Occultist can curse without this via Ascendancy; other classes need it to run 2 curses.

clusters.name: Aspect of the Lynx / Force of Will
clusters.effect: Significant crit multiplier and crit chance for spells. High area near the Witch crit cluster.
clusters.notes: One of the most efficient crit nodes for spell damage. Often pathed on the way to Elemental Overload or other crit keystones.

clusters.name: Throatseeker + Coordination
clusters.effect: High physical damage and life area. Good path for melee builds on top of tree.
clusters.notes: Popular multi-notable stop for melee builds that start Marauder and path upward.

clusters.name: Constitution + Juggernaut
clusters.effect: Large life totals and physical damage reduction. High HP area for tanky builds.
clusters.notes: Core life/defense cluster for Marauder-based builds. Pairs with armour and endurance charges.

clusters.name: Elemental Equilibrium
clusters.effect: Enemies you hit have their resistances reduced by 25% to element types you didn't hit them with, and gain +25% res to the element you did hit with.
build_types: Single-element builds triggering a non-damage hit
clusters.notes: Complex setup: must deal one element via a proc (e.g. Added Lightning to Attacks Support) while main DPS skill deals a different element.

clusters.name: Pain Attunement
clusters.effect: 30% more Spell Damage when on Low Life (below 35%).
clusters.notes: Requires running at low life constantly — typically via Shav's Wrappings ES-on-full-life shield. Very high damage payoff.

clusters.name: Ghost Reaver
clusters.effect: Leech applies to Energy Shield instead of Life. Cannot Leech Life.
clusters.notes: Converts all leech to ES. Must have sufficient ES and leech rate. Pairs well with Vaal Pact for instant ES leech.

clusters.name: Doom Cast
clusters.effect: Curses gain Doom faster and deal more damage at max doom. Strong curse scaling area.
clusters.notes: Primary destination for curse-based builds. Often combined with Whispers of Doom.

clusters.name: Unwavering Stance
clusters.effect: Cannot be Stunned. Cannot Evade enemy Attacks.
clusters.notes: Trades evasion for stun immunity. Juggernaut Ascendancy typically makes this redundant.

clusters.name: Wicked Ward
clusters.effect: Energy Shield Recharge cannot be interrupted. ES Recharge delay reset on pause.
clusters.notes: Pairs with Zealot's Oath (regen applies to ES) for ES regen recovery strategy.

clusters.name: Zealot's Oath
clusters.effect: Life Regeneration applies to Energy Shield instead of Life.
clusters.notes: Requires high regen from passives/flasks/armour. Often combined with Wicked Ward for strong ES recovery.
